content.en:
Jiuyang Void River.

This is an eternal heaven and earth at the end of the realm, but it is only a very ordinary eternal world, and it is not even as good as the origin realm sea.

Today's Origin Realm Sea has many half-step perfect controllers, and even under Ye Tian's cultivation, a small number of perfect controllers have been born.

And the Jiuyang Void River only has one perfect controller, and it is a very weak eternal world.

At this moment, in a forbidden place in the Jiuyang Void River, a fragment was suspended in the void.

And a large number of magic circles have been arranged here, which is to cover the aura of this place and prevent outsiders from entering.

Sitting here is the Lord of the Nine Suns of the Nine Yang Void River, the only perfect controller of the Nine Yang Void River, and only a medium perfect master.

After Ye Tian came here, he didn't pay attention to the Lord of Nine Suns who was cultivating at all, and directly smashed the countless magic circles with one hand, taking the fragment away.

"Who?"

The Lord of Nine Suns was furious, but as soon as he sensed the breath of that big hand, it was countless times more terrifying than himself, and he immediately didn't dare to shout.

Moreover, before he could react, the fragment was taken.

Suddenly, he trembled with fright, where would he dare to pursue it!

"This piece of armor fragment is also very good, and there are many extreme defense extreme powers in it. Ye Tian was quite satisfied.

However.

When he went to look for the third armor fragment at the end of the realm, he found it on a super-perfect master, but this armor fragment was worthless, the extreme defense pole power inside was exhausted, and it was just an armor fragment with a special material, which was of little value to him.

So, he left without asking for the piece.

......

Extreme deep sea.

The Lord of the Black Scales is in retreat.

He is an extreme creature black scale armored dragon, his bloodline is not very strong, and his talent is not too good, he is considered an ordinary extreme creature, but he was lucky enough to find a fragment a long time ago.

At first, although he couldn't get close to this fragment, relying on this fragment, the speed at which he comprehended the Defensive Extreme Dao was very fast.

Later, he became the perfect master of the Shroud, and finally knew what the fragment was.

Now, with the help of this fragment, he has successfully cultivated the Defensive Extreme Dao to the peak realm of Dacheng, and it is not long before he is from the realm of consummation.

Moreover, he was also successfully promoted to the realm of the Perfect Master of the True Realm.

"It's a pity that there isn't much left of the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao contained in this fragment, only one-tenth of the original one!" said the Lord of the Black Scales lamented.

It's a pity that he only has one such fragment, if there are a large number of fragments, maybe he still has the hope of mastering the Extreme Defense Pole.

Abrupt.

Time and space froze, and a black area emerged.

In the next moment, a figure descended.

"Cultivator of the End of the World!"

The Lord of the Black Scales said in fear.

However, before he could make any movements, his consciousness dissipated, and his physical body was directly shattered.

This figure is naturally Ye Tian, he descended here from the primordial black sea and directly killed the Lord of the Black Scales.

Immediately, he took the piece of armor and fled.

Soon, a big man from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace came.

She is the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who ranks among the top few in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and has mastered the Extreme Dao of Water, the Extreme Dao of Ice and the Extreme Dao of Wind in the Extreme Realm, so her strength is far beyond that of ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

The Lord of the Black Scales' residence was not too far from the Ice Palace where she was, and just now she sensed the fluctuations of the primordial Black Sea, so she came to take a look.

As a result, it was discovered that the Lord of the Black Scales had been killed.

"The Lord of the Black Scales is the perfect controller of the True Realm, and he was killed silently by other powerhouses, and the other party has mastered the Extreme Extreme Dao, could it be someone from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace?"

"No, it's definitely not them, it's very likely to be the powerhouse of the end of the world!"

The Ice Palace Lord tried to peek into time and space to see the past.

However, she couldn't see who shot her, so she could only choose to spy on the dead Lord of the Black Scales.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space go backwards, and the past scenes are presented one by one.

Using her cultivation as a spied into the past time and space of a perfect controller of the True Realm was also a bit difficult.

But soon, she spied a little bit of something.

In the past plane, a fragment caught her attention.

"At this time......"

Although the Ice and Snow Palace Lord couldn't spy on the specific aura of the True Realm Perfect Controller's past time and space, the moment she saw this fragment, she still probably guessed it.

"The Primordial Black Armor turned out to be this thing, the Primordial Black Armor was shattered, most of it was revealed to the Primordial Black Sea, and a small number of fragments were revealed to the Extreme Deep Sea and the end of the realm, but I didn't expect the Lord of the Black Scales to be lucky enough to find a piece. "The Ice and Snow Palace Lord probably knows the other party's purpose, it must be to snatch the original black armor fragment of the Lord of Black Scales.

However, just a fragment of primordial black armor didn't mean much, it didn't have much value to her, but to an ordinary Extreme Realm perfect master, it was still very valuable.

Or for the strong who are about to master the extreme of extreme defense, it is also of great value.

"I want to see who is so shameless, a powerhouse who has mastered the extreme extreme, and also takes action against the juniors of the perfect controller of the true realm, and robs the juniors of the juniors!"

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord began to urge his own Cause and Effect Pole to find each other through the cause and effect line.

Rumble!!!

Her small pinnacle of cause and effect began to explore, but all she saw was nothingness.

"Can't find it!"

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord was stunned.

Soon, she figured out that the mysterious powerhouse's Cause and Effect Extreme Dao realm was afraid that it was above her.

So, she found a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, who was good at the Cause and Effect Extreme Path, and cultivated the Cause and Effect Extreme Path to the peak realm of Dacheng.

However, after this shot, no trace was found.

"Damn, this person can't have cultivated the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the consummation realm!"

The Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace said secretly.

In desperation, she had no choice but to give up.

......

The End of the World.

Ye Tian looked at the four armor fragments in his hand, and the extreme defense extreme power in one of the armor fragments was consumed a lot, and only a trace was left, and the value plummeted, but there would still be people who wanted it.

"With such good things, trading ordinary resources with others is naturally a waste, and the best way is to trade treasures containing extreme power with others. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He decided to ask the Lord of the Ancient for help, after all, he was only the perfect controller of the True Realm, and he couldn't catch up with the circle of the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, so he couldn't find anyone to trade!

After all, the Lord of the Ancient Realm is the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and if he knows other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, he naturally has a channel for trading.

Soon, Ye Tian found the Lord of Canggu and told him about it.
